title: acelica cydoniifolia
intro: Acelica cydoniifolia, also known as Cydonia oblonga, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. It is commonly known as the quince plant, which is native to Asia and Southeastern Europe. The medicinal properties of Acelica cydoniifolia are attributed to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as tea, jams, and other herbal remedies.
